title: Beehiiv vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Sendinblue (Brevo): pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your needs best.
intro: Beehiiv and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different primary audiences. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers seeking monetization and growth tools, while Sendinblue excels at transactional email and multi-channel communication. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right platform for your specific use case.
choose_a_if: You operate a paid or sponsored newsletter and want built-in monetization tools
Growing an audience-focused publication is your priority
You prefer a platform designed specifically for newsletter publishers
choose_b_if: You need transactional email capabilities alongside marketing campaigns
SMS, WhatsApp, or chat messaging integration is essential for your business
You want the largest free tier with 100,000 subscribers included

faq.a: Neither is objectively 'better'—it depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter creators wanting monetization features, while Sendinblue is superior for businesses needing multi-channel communication and transactional email. Beehiiv's newer approach appeals to growth-focused publishers, whereas Sendinblue's maturity benefits enterprises.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue offers better value for most users: its free plan supports 100,000 subscribers compared to Beehiiv's 2,500, and paid plans start at $25 versus $39. However, Beehiiv's pricing becomes competitive if you need newsletter monetization features, which Sendinblue doesn't offer.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support subscriber list imports and exports. Most email marketing tools use standard CSV formats, making migration straightforward. However, you'll need to rebuild custom automations and segments, as these don't always transfer directly between platforms.
